figures.caption: Figure 1. Case study on a Hardware Verification Agent
Figure 9. Trajectory of agent priority scores over 21 rounds. For each round, scores are normalized across all agents.
Figure 2. (a) An example of branching reasoning in Tree-of-Thought. (b) A detailed view of the sampling process for State 4. (c) Tree-of-Thoughts process using Logits Cache

Figure 8. Performance of Logits Cache under different temperatures for two replay policies. (a)–(d) show the results for step-wise sampling, and (e)–(h) show the results for hotspot sampling. The reported metrics include mean TPS, P50 TPS, speedup, and logits-cache hit rate.
Figure 6. Hive Front End: the Python-based pseudo-code to describe agents and supervisors, the generated flow graph, and the runtime system.
